description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On March 26, 2025 (Thursday), the Hanno City Traffic Safety Promotion Council and Hanno Local Traffic Safety Association presented "randoseru covers" (backpack rain covers) to new first-graders in Hanno City for traffic safety. The Hanno Police Station and Hanno Local Traffic Safety Association also presented "Okeiko Land," a traffic safety booklet for parents and children to learn together.

We will put these to good use so that children can commute to school safely, and we extend our gratitude to all those involved.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13358.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Presentation of "Randoseru Covers" and traffic safety booklet "Okeiko Land" to new first-graders
